effect.subject: tok_ibsrela_callout_white_outline
effect.reserved_for: key strategic question callouts (e.g. 'DO YOU WANT TO TRY SOMETHING DIFFERENT?')

rule_text: The rounded-rectangle callout with white outline and transparent fill (callout.strategic_question.border) is reserved for key strategic questions, e.g. the 'DO YOU WANT TO TRY SOMETHING DIFFERENT?' ask.
intent: Reserve a distinct callout treatment for the strategic-question device.
summary: Use white-outlined, transparent-fill rounded-rectangle callout (callout.strategic_question.border) exclusively for key strategic questions.
